name: Warp
description: You target a creature within a moderate (20 unit) distance and warp their physical form. If your spell check beats the target's endurance, they take 12 aetheric damage and suffer a -1 penalty to all physique and finesse checks until the end of their next turn. If you do not roll at least 2 successes on your spell check, the target instead gains a +1 bonus to all physique and finesse checks and a +1 bonus to all melee attacks until the end of their next turn.
charge: The spell becomes a 2 unit radius centered on you and deals 15 aetheric damage.
